nasb.text: For if you truly amend your ways and your deeds, if you truly practice justice between a man and his neighbor,

esv.text: “For if you truly amend your ways and your deeds, if you truly execute justice one with another,

cnv.text: 如果你們實在改正自己的所作所為，人與人之間認真施行公正；

ccb.text: “‘如果你们真正改过自新，彼此公平相待，
